title: Mirror Parity Result
description: Schema for recording the result of a parity check between source and mirror systems.

fixture_id.description: Unique identifier of the parity fixture that was checked.

source_output.description: The expected output from the source system (or fixture).

mirror_output.description: The actual output produced by the mirror.

deviation.description: Numeric measure of divergence between source and mirror (0.0 = identical).

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the check was performed.
